_instructions.edit: Edit this file only. Do not edit index.html or styles.css unless changing the design.
_instructions.textLength: Keep text length roughly similar to the existing copy to avoid layout overflow.
_instructions.images: Place new images in public/assets/ and reference them by path, e.g. /assets/flyer-tresor.png
_instructions.preview: After editing, run the dev server and check the proposal still fits on exactly 2 A4 pages.
_instructions.export: Export as PDF using the button in the top bar, or via browser print (A4, no margins, background graphics on).
_instructions.howToUse: To create a new venue proposal: copy this file to proposal-data.json (overwrite it), then fill in your venue details below.

meta.pageTitle: Rave for Good e.V. — Collaboration Proposal Tresor Berlin 2026
meta.exportBarLabel: Rave for Good e.V. — Collaboration Proposal 2026

sections.label: Who We Are
sections.heading: Rave for Good e.V.
sections.body: Rave for Good e.V. is a Berlin-based non-profit organisation connecting electronic music culture with social impact. We organise charity rave events where proceeds are donated transparently to carefully selected non-profit causes.
sections.bodySuffix: Founded in Berlin. Rooted in the community.

sections.label: The Concept
sections.heading: One Event. One Purpose.
sections.body: We would love to collaborate with Tresor on a charity-focused event that genuinely fits the DNA of both sides: musically uncompromising, culturally authentic, inclusive, and community-driven.
sections.bodySuffix: 100% of ticket revenue would go into a jointly agreed donation fund.

sections.label: Why Tresor
sections.heading: A shared commitment.
bodyLines: Tresor stands for the founding spirit of Berlin techno — raw, inclusive, and politically aware. That integrity is exactly why it feels like such a meaningful fit for a charity event.
We have mutual connections within the Berlin techno community who encouraged us to reach out directly.
If there is mutual interest, we would love to build a longer-term relationship — ideally one event per season.

page1Footer.identity: Rave for Good e.V. · Tresor Berlin · Collaboration Proposal 2026

stats.label: Results So Far
stats.note: We have also collaborated with Zur Klappe, Ziegra, and Rave The Planet. All DJs perform free of charge and are only reimbursed for direct costs — allowing at least 75% of revenue to go directly toward the cause.

paragraphs.text: Hard techno, industrial, and driving non-main-room sounds — energy that builds from midnight into morning.
Deep techno and ambient — creating space before the main programme begins.

2 × CDJ-3000
Allen & Heath Xone:96 or equivalent
We want to create an open, respectful, and welcoming environment for everyone.
harassment, discrimination, homophobia, antisemitism, sexism, or abusive behaviour of any kind.
We bring our own awareness team and would be very happy to work together with the Tresor team to ensure a safe and positive atmosphere throughout the event.

lowerSections.label: What We Would Love to Know

items.text: Availability for a weekend night slot between July and October 2026
Globus / Tresor Floor / OHM for main programme
venue hire vs. revenue share, bar split, etc.
